description: USD pricing rules keyed by (destination_region, product_type). Read by scripts/apply-tour-product.mjs to set tours.price (sale price) and tours.original_price (strikethrough). Falls back to JSON-derived price if no rule matches.

rules.note: Jeju small group day tours — uniform pricing.

fallback.note: When no rule matches the tour's (destination_region, product_type), apply-tour-product.mjs uses hero.price.amountLabel from the JSON and leaves original_price NULL.
